name: est_div_concurrent_client
description: Est Div (Establishment Division) Army client order running concurrently with SATA order, sharing Voltas supplier and internal staff group. Tests routing separation between two concurrent clients through shared infrastructure — messages from shared groups (Tasks, Voltas) must route to the correct client order.

missing: Other supplier chats for est_div items not available
Some item delivery confirmations may be outside window

expected_output: Separate task for Est Div client order. Messages from shared groups (Tasks, Voltas) correctly attributed — est_div items to est_div task, SATA items to SATA task. No cross-client item contamination.
pass_criteria: PASS: Est Div order tracked as separate task, shared group messages routed correctly. FAIL: Items from SATA mixed into est_div task or vice versa.
notes: Est Div client is Nk Chanamalla Sir. Key staff overlap with SATA: Mrs Samita Roy, Abhisha. Voltas supplier serves both clients. This case specifically tests Layer 2b entity routing on shared groups.
